arts.ttl: Barcelona possible starting XI against Benfica in the Champions League
arts.sum: Koundé, Araújo, Cubarsí, and Balde —who played a stellar game in Getafe despite facing racist insults—will form the defense. As the Benfica-Barça match approaches this Tuesday at 3:00 PM EST, the biggest question mark in Hansi Flick’s lineup seems to be the goalkeeper position.

arts.ttl: 'For sure’: Leandro Trossard says Arsenal currently have a player he prefers to Dennis Bergkamp
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard has been building his ultimate five-a-side team made up of past and present Arsenal players. Speaking to the Premier League, Leandro Trossard has...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid want to 'STEAL' Barcelona signing
arts.sum: Real Madrid could reportedly “steal” the signing of Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah from under the noses of arch-rivals Barcelona . Tah, 28, is reportedly open to the idea of joining Barcelona on a free transfer this summer, while Manchester United are also keeping tabs on his situation as Ruben Amorim eyes defensive reinforcements following an underwhelming start to life at Old Trafford .

arts.ttl: Barcelona offered chance to sign PSG star in January
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona were recently contacted by super agent Jorge Mendes, over a potential deal for one of his clients. That’s according to Diario Sport, citing El Chiringuito TV,…

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona will have scouts in attendance at Atlético Madrid vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Scouts from La Liga giants Barcelona are set to be in attendance at tonight’s meeting between Atlético Madrid and Bayer Leverkusen. That’s according to ESPN, who point towards the focus…

arts.ttl: Barcelona to scout Jonathan Tah, Florian Wirtz - sources
arts.sum: Barcelona representatives will watch Bayer Leverkusen duo Jonathan Tah and Florian Wirtz in Tuesday's Champions League game at Atlético Madrid, sources have confirmed to ESPN. Since joining from Hamburg in 2015, Tah has made over 350 appearances for Leverkusen and been capped 33 times by Germany .

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford future: Barcelona can afford to sign Man United outcast who becomes 'priority target'
arts.sum: Barcelona can afford to sign Marcus Rashford this month and have made the Manchester United outcast their 'priority' target, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Benfica vs Barcelona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: Barcelona travel to Benfica tonight in a bid to make it six successive Champions League wins. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both ...

The Champions League continues for FC Barcelona this week with a mouth-watering trip to Benfica. The second away trip in a row after the Getafe game, another win in Europe is the aim, and Hansi Flick has named 23 players for the tie.

arts.ttl: Como Make Bold Move for Barcelona’s Eric Garcia
arts.sum: Como's ambitious transfer strategy continues to make waves in Italian football, and fresh off the heels of securing Dele Alli on a free transfer, the Italian club have now set their sights on Barcelona defender Eric Garcia. This latest pursuit underscores Como's determination to not only secure Serie A survival but also to build a sustainable project blending experience with emerging talent. The post Como Make Bold Move for Barcelona’s Eric Garcia appeared first on FootItalia.com.
